nutanix_host_count.sql:
SELECT SUM(t."Host Count") as "Total Host Count"
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (cluster_name)
    num_nodes as "Host Count"
    FROM nutanix_cluster_metrics
    WHERE cluster_name ILIKE %s
    AND (collection_time >= NOW() - interval '1 month')
    ORDER BY cluster_name, "collection_time" DESC
) t
